IDM Gaming''' is a Brazilian team, created as a result of a partnership between [[Ilha da Macacada Gaming]] and [[KaBuM! e-Sports]]. == History == On November 2016, [[Ilha da Macacada Gaming]] and [[KaBuM! e-Sports]] announced a partnership. With this, IDM earned a spot in [[CBLOL/2017 Season/Split 1|CBLOL 2017 Split 1]], while KaBuM! became a title sponsor for the team. On January 2017, before the start of the season, the partnership was dropped, with KaBuM! retaining its CBLOL spot, while IDM maintained its Challenger Circuit spot. == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} ==Organization== ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|staff=yes|newteam=yes}} {{listplayersp||br|Vitor Barbosa|'''President'''|newteam=IDM}} {{listplayersp|Mrelic|br|André Marden|'''Manager/Director'''|newteam=IDM}} {{listplayer|Neki|br|Vinícius Ghilardi|'''Head Coach'''|newteam=KaBuM}} {{listplayer/End}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|KaBuM!
